manifest.name: Secret Placeholders

manifest.author: Jamie Steiner
manifest.name: Send Note
manifest.description: Instantly send a note, to other obsidian users so they can import them into their vault. It uses AWS S3 as a storage backend. Data is shared encrypted by default, and only you and the person you send it to have the key.

manifest.author: 4Source
manifest.name: Settings profiles
manifest.description: Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.

manifest.name: Settings Search
manifest.description: Globally search settings in Obsidian.md

manifest.description: Groups Community Plugins into folders, allows renaming, reordering, and compacting the sidebar.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Better Search and Replace
manifest.description: Enhanced search and replace with regex support, live diff preview, capture groups, and a floating editor bar.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Click Image to Zoom
manifest.description: Click any image in your notes to open it in a full-size zoomable modal. Supports scroll-to-zoom, drag-to-pan, and per-note frontmatter control.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Open in New Tab
manifest.description: Forces files to open in new tabs instead of replacing the current tab. Covers all opening methods including Quick Switcher, command palette, bookmarks, search, backlinks, and graph view.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Save as Local Images
manifest.description: Download all remote images in the current note and save them locally to your vault's attachment folder, rewriting URLs to point to the local copies.

manifest.description: Share notes and their links as a ZIP folder.
